name: Breaded Shrimp a La Mode
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean shrimp and devein them, leaving the tail on.
2. Wash well and season with lemon juice, salt, and paprika.
3. Arrange 5 shrimp on each skewer, placing a piece of mozzarella between the tail and the part closest to where the head was.
4. Beat eggs and stir in parmesan cheese; season with a little salt.
5. Dip skewers first in flour, then in the egg mixture, and finally coat them in breadcrumbs mixed with cornflakes.
6. Deep fry in oil until golden brown.
Serve with rice and tartar sauce.
